REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1707 Fremont Way, Oakland, Ca 94601)
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Continued To Sep-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Juana Montgomery-Kleiman.

Mr. Vann requested a 30-day continuance stating that the Buyers are insisting that they evict the squatters. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to September 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
